reports.title: last30days-skill
reports.summary: 一个 AI 代理技能，用于跨 Reddit、X、YouTube、HN、Polymarket 和全网检索话题，并生成有依据的综合摘要。
reports.content: Repository: mvanhorn/last30days-skill. AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web, then synthesizes a grounded summary.

reports.title: taste-skill
reports.summary: 让 AI 具备更好的审美判断，避免输出千篇一律、缺乏个性的内容。
reports.content: Repository: Leonxlnx/taste-skill. Taste-Skill gives your AI good taste and stops it from generating boring, generic slop.

reports.title: open-notebook
reports.summary: 一个更灵活、功能更完整的开源 NotebookLM 替代实现。
reports.content: Repository: lfnovo/open-notebook. An open source implementation of NotebookLM with more flexibility and features.

reports.title: AiToEarn
reports.summary: 围绕用 AI 创造收益的开源项目。
reports.content: Repository: yikart/AiToEarn. Let's use AI to Earn!

reports.title: project-nomad
reports.summary: 一台可离线运行的自包含生存计算机，集成了关键工具、知识和 AI 能力。
reports.content: Repository: Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad. Project N.O.M.A.D is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered anytime, anywhere.

reports.title: turbovec
reports.summary: 基于 TurboQuant 的 Rust 向量索引，提供 Python 绑定。
reports.content: Repository: RyanCodrai/turbovec. A vector index built on TurboQuant, written in Rust with Python bindings.

reports.title: LLMs are eroding my software engineering career and I don't know what to do
reports.title_zh: 大模型正在侵蚀我的软件工程职业生涯，我不知道该怎么办
reports.summary: 一篇在 Hacker News 首页走红的反思文章，讨论大模型正在如何冲击软件工程职业路径，以及作者对未来的迷茫。

reports.title: Anthropic, please ship an official Claude Desktop for Linux
reports.title_zh: Anthropic，请推出官方 Linux 版 Claude Desktop
reports.summary: 开发者呼吁 Anthropic 提供官方 Linux 版 Claude Desktop，评论区围绕桌面端体验与跨平台支持展开。

reports.title: The 29th International Obfuscated C Code Contest (IOCCC) 2025 Winners
reports.title_zh: 第29届国际晦涩 C 代码大赛 2025 获奖作品
reports.summary: IOCCC 2025 获奖名单发布，展示了一批极具创意和混淆技巧的 C 代码作品。

reports.title: Building from zero after addiction, prison, and a felony
reports.title_zh: 从成瘾、监禁和重罪记录中从零开始
reports.summary: 一篇关于从成瘾、监禁和重罪记录中重新起步的个人经历文章，在 HN 上引发了大量讨论。

reports.title: Gemma 4 12B: A unified, encoder-free multimodal model
reports.title_zh: Gemma 4 12B：统一的无编码器多模态模型
reports.summary: 围绕 Gemma 4 12B 的多模态、无编码器架构和开源可用性展开讨论。

reports.title: Anthropic files for IPO before OpenAI as they race to go public
reports.title_zh: Anthropic 赶在 OpenAI 之前递交 IPO 申请，竞逐上市进程
reports.summary: NBC 报道称 Anthropic 已提交 IPO 申请，意味着这家 AI 公司向公开市场又迈进一步。
